title: Craftable Elytra [Simple Additions Series]
description: Make you able to craft elytra
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required

- Dragon Scale
  
# ✨ Features
This mod add a simple crafting to the elytra, that require to defeat the Ender Dragon.

### To craft the elytra you will need:

- 3 dragon scales
- 3 phantom membrane
  
### In this order:
![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f48fcc2f74fc9010357c0065c6262093b0219d33.png)
